name: sinan
description: Codex-first orchestration plugin with small skills, deterministic routing, declarative workflows, and a four-hook core.

interface.shortDescription: Route work into skills, workflows, and native modes
interface.longDescription: Sinan is a Codex-first orchestration plugin that keeps small tasks light, routes broad work into declarative workflows, and bundles a compact hook core for context, prompt routing, Bash safety, and handoff.
defaultPrompt: Use Sinan to route this task.
Use Sinan to plan this implementation.
Use Sinan to review this change.
